description:
Use your phone as a camera directly in OBS Studio.


- Support for OBS Studio version 32.2.
- Fix for a hw decoding issue reported by some users in 2.5.0.
- ℹ️See also previous release notes for latest feature updates.
Tip: click [Watch] on this GitHub repository to get notified about new releases.
DroidCamOBS.Setup.2.5.1.exe (Windows 10+ (x64, arm64), OBS v32.2)
DroidCamOBS_2.5.1_macos.pkg (macOS 10.13+ (x64, arm64), OBS v32.2)
droidcam_obs_2.5.1_linux_x86_64.zip (Linux systems with FFmpeg8/libavcodec62 (x64), OBS v32.2)
